name: BPLATFORM
description: Platform/bat animation for bouncing ball games
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="BPLATFORM" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="bplatform2" simulationFunctionType="SCILAB" style="BPLATFORM">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="7" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="2"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="2"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="-5"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="5"/>
    <data line="5" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="6" column="0" value="15"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="7">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="2.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" realPart="2.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" realPart="-5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="4" realPart="5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="5" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="6" realPart="15.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="300.0" y="200.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Empty integerParameters - only uses real parameters
Has ControlPort like other visualization blocks
criticalRules: SCILAB type means slower but flexible execution
